title: polypodium gauthieri
intro: Polypodium gauthieri, also known as the Gauthier's polypody, is a type of fern that belongs to the family Polypodiaceae. This plant has been used in traditional medicine for its medicinal properties, including anti-inflammatory and antiseptic properties. The health benefits of Polypodium gauthieri include its ability to reduce fever, relieve pain, and improve respiratory issues. In herbal preparations, the plant is often used to make teas, infusions, and tinctures, which can be used to treat various health conditions.
